title: One PETS-TOP Small Dog Bed - Washable Fluffy Calming Bed - Soft Long Plush with Removable Cover, Dodo Donuts XXL Extra Large Mattress (Pearl Grey, 60cm)
features: Washable and Removable for Impeccable Cleanliness: The dog bed Dodo Donut is easy to maintain with its removable and machine-washable cover, ensuring a healthy and hygienic environment for your dog or cat. Ideal for pets with sensitive skin, this soothing anti-stress dog cushion is also flea and parasite resistant. Provide your pet with a comfortable and durable resting space with this premium-quality bed.

Comfort for All Animals: This removable and washable Dodo Donut dog cushion is ideal for dogs and cats of all sizes, providing a cozy and soothing resting space. Give your pet the best in comfort and quality with this versatile and stylish dog and cat bed.

Tailored to the Needs of the Animal: The Dodo Donut dog beds large is designed to meet the comfort, size, and style needs of your dog or cat. Its large-sized dog bed and anti-stress dog cushion provide optimal support for animals dealing with stress or anxiety. Additionally, this round cat bed is perfect for cats that enjoy snuggling in a secure space

Versatile and Stylish to Suit Every Interior: The Dodo Donut dog bed medium combines functionality and aesthetics to seamlessly integrate with your interior decor. With its modern and sleek design, this dog and cat bed complements all styles of homes. Whether you have a small cat bed or an elevated dog bed, this soothing and comfortable puppy bed will delight your pet while adding a touch of style to your living space

A Design Born in France: One PETS-TOP has been manufacturing dog beds and furniture since 2017, and the DODO Donut large-sized dog bed represents our most refined creation. We put our heart into developing pet accessories for your beloved animals. Our superior quality is now acknowledged by our customers in France and across Europe.
description: Product Description Give your dog or cat the ultimate comfort with our Dodo Donut Dog Bed, designed for pets of all sizes. This cushion dog bed is ideal for dogs and cats who like to snuggle up and feel safe. Made with high quality material, this large dog cushion provides unparalleled comfort and optimal support for pets with osteoarthritis, joint pain or simply for those who love to lounge. With its soothing donut design, this dog bed mattress is perfect for anxious and stressed pets. The Dodo Donut Cat Basket is easy to care for thanks to its washable and removable cover. It is also scratch and bite resistant, making it a lasting choice for pet owners. This large dog mat is also ideal for cats, providing a comfortable space for lounging and sleeping. Whether you have a small Chihuahua dog, a large Labrador dog or a kitten, this dodo donut cat bed will meet all their comfort needs. Don't wait any longer and give your pet the cozy bed they dream of with our Dodo Donut Cat Basket! Directions Leave for 48 hours for the product to regain its plumpness
